summary: We just released Mastodon 4.5.8, 4.4.15, and 4.3.21. These versions contain various bug fixes, including fixes for medium severity security issues. Full release notes and update instructions are available on the GitHub releases page. https:// github.com/mastodon/mastodon/r eleases # mastoadmin
content:
We just released Mastodon 4.5.8, 4.4.15, and 4.3.21.

These versions contain various bug fixes, including fixes for medium severity security issues.

Full release notes and update instructions are available on the GitHub releases page.

https://github.com/mastodon/mastodon/releases

#mastoadmin
